vulnerability.reference: Clinicians' trust calibration poorly matches model reliability.
vulnerability.generated: Clinicians and patients accept verbalized probabilities at face value, lacking means to detect miscalibration outside the training distribution.

impact.reference: Misdiagnosis and inappropriate treatment decisions harm patients.
impact.generated: Unwarranted trust in miscalibrated advice causes incorrect diagnoses and harmful treatment decisions, jeopardizing patient safety.

dose_response.reference: Supervised fine-tuning for linguistic calibration yields poorly calibrated verbalized probability, which in LLM diagnosis tools causes overreliance by clinicians and patients, leading to misdiagnosis and patient harm.
dose_response.generated: Supervised fine-tuning yielding poorly calibrated verbalized probabilities outside the training distribution, through clinicians and patients using LLM-based diagnosis tools, triggers their acceptance of these probabilities at face value without detecting miscalibration, leading to unwarranted trust causing incorrect diagnoses and harmful treatment decisions.
